channel.title: Multilogin Labs — Updates
channel.description: Antidetect, cloud phone, Multilogin X API, MMO playbooks. Partner pricing inside.

item.title: v4 mega upgrade — 480+ docs, OpenAPI, Swagger UI, calculator
item.description: OpenAPI 3.0 spec from 90 endpoints, Swagger UI, calculator.html, weekly auto-upgrade Action, 12 Vietnamese guides, long-form comparisons.

item.title: Cookbook expanded to 40 recipes
item.description: Includes Playwright, Selenium, Puppeteer, 2FA, parallel sessions, disaster recovery patterns.

item.title: Comparison matrix — 16 antidetect tools
item.description: One-page matrix plus deep-dive sections for AdsPower, GoLogin, Octo, Dolphin Anty.

item.title: 30 country playbooks — VN, ID, BR, IN, USA, DE...
item.description: MMO-ready setup per market: proxy, plan, platform.
